title: Base to activate B20 standard for stablecoins, RWAs and other tokens
summary: Base is scheduled to activate its B20 token standard on Wednesday at 6 pm UTC, allowing developers to begin creating native tokens on the network.

title: EU to again vote to extend ‘chat control’ rules
summary: So-called “chat control” rules could be revived in the EU, with lawmakers again set to vote on the legislation Thursday.

title: Temasek CIO: Iran Conflict Resolution Needs More Time
summary: Temasek International's Chief Investment Officer Rohit Sipahimalani tells Bloomberg that it would take time to get to "some resolution" of the Iran conflict, noting that while both sides are interested in deescalation, the process will not be a straight line. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall as Trump Puts Mideast Back in Focus: Markets Wrap
summary: Stocks fell, bond yields spiked and oil rallied after President Donald Trump thrust geopolitical risks back into focus by declaring the ceasefire between the US and Iran to be over.

title: Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
Polymarket has enabled instant self-custodial Bitcoin deposits via the Lightning Network using Spark.
This post Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark

title: Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
Kraken is seeking a final Delaware court judgment against former auditor Mazars after winning a $22 million arbitration award, arguing the firm's abrupt resignation during heightened U.S. regulatory pressure

title: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
summary: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

title: SEC's Long-Promised Crypto Safe Harbor to Be Introduced as Soon as This Month
summary: The SEC updated its agenda to indicate that a key crypto rulemaking is slated to be released for public comment in July.

title: Nigel Farage to quit UK Parliament, seek new mandate amid probes into crypto-linked gifts
summary: Nigel Farage resigned as an MP amid two probes over gifts from Tether investor Christopher Harborne and convicted fraudster George Cottrell.

title: Tom Lee’s Bitmine adds $70 million worth of ETH to treasury: onchain analyst
summary: Bitmine's most recent disclosure shows that it holds 5.74 million ETH, roughly 4.8% of Ethereum's circulating supply.

title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’
summary: Oil price extends gains after US president says that negotiating with Tehran is a ‘waste of time’

title: US and Iran trade strikes after attacks on tankers
summary: Donald Trump says he thinks ceasefire deal with Tehran is ‘over’ after round of tit-for-tat bombing
